note: Resolved banner header now carries a red pulsing 'MINERS: UPDATE REQUIRED' badge next to the green 'CHAIN RESUMED, LOTTERY LIVE' title. Reuses the existing phase2CentralisedPulse keyframe so the badge throbs at the same cadence as the UPDATED MINERS card on the dashboard. Visible above the fold without expanding the banner — even if a miner has the body collapsed they still see the call to action. Banner body content unchanged.
